en: It's different from most of the girls I've been with.
So call her up, Romeo.
Why? So I can realize she's not that smart, that she's fucking boring? You know, I mean, you don't...
ko: 왜? 그녀가 그렇게 똑똑하지 않고, 지루하다는 걸 깨닫게 하려고? 너도 알잖아...

en: This girl's, like, fucking perfect right now.
I don't want to ruin that.
Maybe you're perfect right now.
Maybe you don't want to ruin that.
ko: 어쩌면 너도 그걸 망치고 싶지 않을 거야.

en: But I think that's a super philosophy, Will.
ko: 하지만 그건 정말 멋진 철학이야, 윌.

en: That way you can go through your entire life
without ever having to really know anybody.
My wife used to fart when she was nervous.
ko: 내 아내는 긴장할 때 방귀를 뀌곤 했어.

en: She had all sorts of wonderful little ecstasies.
ko: 그녀는 여러 가지 멋진 작은 환희를 가졌어.

en: You know, she used to fart in her sleep.
ko: 그녀는 잠을 자면서 방귀를 뀌곤 했어.

en: I'm sorry I shared that with you.
One night, it was so loud, it woke the dog up.
ko: 어느 날 밤, 너무 시끄러워서 개를 깨웠어.

en: She woke up and got like, oh, is that you?
See, I didn't have the heart to tell her. Oh, God.
ko: 나는 그녀에게 말할 용기가 없었어. 오, 신이여.

en: She woke herself up. Oh, Christ.
Ah, but Will, she's been dead two years.
ko: 아, 하지만 윌, 그녀는 2년 전에 죽었어.

en: And how long is she still going to be here?
What the fuck's wrong with you? Don't give me that look.
ko: 너는 도대체 뭐가 문제야? 그런 표정 짓지 마.
